generation.prompt: Steady World War Two radial aircraft engine heard from inside the cockpit at cruise power, smooth warm low mechanical rumble, constant RPM and constant intensity, no revving, no acceleration, no startup or shutdown, no music, no alarms, no voices, subtle and non-fatiguing background ambience, seamless continuous loop with matching beginning and end

mastering.masteringReason: Reseam 2026-07-23: prior equal-power crossfade destructively interfered on the tonal radial-engine drone, notching ~3.5 dB across ~400 ms at the loop region (heard as the engine cutting off). Rebuilt as a 7.996 s loop: 1.5 s crossfade whose body length is chosen to maximize head/tail phase correlation so tonal components add coherently (sustained dip 0.51 dB, within the source's natural 50 ms RMS fluctuation). Single linear gain of +4.9 dB, peak-limited to true peak -1.61 dBTP (<= -1.5 target); no dynamic loudnorm to avoid seam pumping.
